metadata.title: Time After Time
metadata.album: She's So Unusual: A 30th Anniversary Celebration (Deluxe Edition)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:14.79] Lyin' in my bed, I hear the clock tick and think of you
[00:21.89] Caught up in circles, confusion is nothing new
[00:28.83] Flashback, warm nights almost left behind
[00:35.87] Suitcase of memories
[00:39.91] Time after-
[00:42.68] Sometimes you picture me, I'm walking too far ahead
[00:49.69] You're calling to me, I can't hear what you've said
[00:57.01] Then you say, "Go slow", I fall behind
[01:03.77] The second hand unwinds
[01:07.40] If you're lost, you can look, and you will find me
[01:11.45] Time after time
[01:14.45] If you fall, I will catch you, I'll be waiting
[01:18.96] Time after time
[01:22.47] If you're lost, you can look, and you will find me
[01:26.27] Time after time
[01:29.54] If you fall, I will catch you, I will be waiting
[01:33.98] Time after time
[01:38.00] 
[01:52.38] After my picture fades and darkness has turned to gray
[01:59.38] Watchin' through windows, you're wondering if I'm okay
[02:06.83] Secrets stolen from deep inside
[02:13.33] The drum beats out of time
[02:17.18] If you're lost, you can look, and you will find me
[02:21.47] Time after time
[02:24.12] If you fall, I will catch you, I'll be waiting
[02:28.88] Time after time
[02:32.60] 
[02:47.62] You said, "Go slow", I fall behind
[02:53.56] The second hand unwinds
[02:58.01] If you're lost, you can look, and you will find me
[03:02.18] Time after time

[03:09.16] Time after time

[03:16.41] Time after time
[03:19.90] If you fall, I will catch you, I will be waiting
[03:24.43] Time after time
